subject: Roof structural steel connection at skylight well
question: Architectural drawings show skylight well openings at roof level but structural steel framing plan does not detail the trimmer framing or connection to main roof girders. Please provide structural detail for skylight well perimeter framing and connection to W24 girder at Gridline D.

subject: TSA checkpoint partition wall height
question: Specification section 10 22 39 specifies TSA partition walls at 8-foot height but security design drawings show 10-foot height at primary screening lanes. Which governs? MAC security coordinator needs to approve before framing proceeds.

subject: Airfield concrete mix design cold weather
question: Specification section 32 13 14 requires minimum concrete temperature of 50°F at time of placement. Current schedule shows Taxiway connector pours in February. Please confirm if owner will authorize accelerated admixtures and heated enclosures or if pour will be deferred to April.

subject: PCC joint sealant at runway blast pad transition
question: Drawings show a standard contraction joint at the Runway 35 blast pad to runway transition but do not specify sealant type. FAA Advisory Circular 150/5370-10 requires fiberboard joint filler at this transition. Please confirm.
